zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Northwode於1358年出生在英國艾可布萊崔時，她的父親Sir John de Northwode30歲，母親Joan Hart21歲。她於大約1371年與Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales在英國艾可沙爾福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1414年1月3日在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾格亞特 巴福德哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Northwode于1358年出生在英国艾可布萊崔时，她的父亲Sir John de Northwode30岁，母亲Joan Hart21岁。她于大约1371年与Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales在英国艾可沙爾福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1414年1月3日在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾格亞特 巴福德哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Northwode was born in 1358, in Braintree, Essex, England, her father, Sir John de Northwode, was 30 and her mother, Joan Hart, was 21. She married Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales about 1371, in Shalford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 3 January 1414, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales environ 1371, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 3 janvier 1414, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales circa 1371, nel Shalford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Northwodeが1358年にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父Sir John de Northwodeは30歳，母Joan Hartは21歳であった。約1371年にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードでLord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1414年1月3日にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアグレアト バーフォードアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Ashwellthorpe, So: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 그리트 바퍼드 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Northwode(이)가 1358년 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Northwode(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hart(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1371년 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 1월 3일 영국 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 그리트 바퍼드 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Northwode nasceu em 1358, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Northwode, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hart, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales aproximadamente 1371, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 3 de janeiro de 1414, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Ashwellthorpe, So: алл сеинц чурчярд, грит барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Northwode родилась в 1358 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Northwode было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hart, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales около 1371 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 3 января 1414 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, грит барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lord Roger de Scales IV Baron Scales aproximadamente 1371, en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 3 de enero de 1414, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
